run.window_note: Expanded from strict 72h to 5 days — strict window yielded 4 verified items, below the 5-item threshold.

items.title: 1Password for Claude Lets Agents Authenticate Without Exposing Credentials
key_claims: Credential injection via local MCP server — secrets never exposed in prompt or environment
Mac-only at launch; Windows and Linux on public roadmap
Requires 1Password Teams or Business subscription
caveats: Mac-only restriction limits deployment to Mac-based development environments

items.title: Hugging Face Discloses First Confirmed Autonomous AI Agent Intrusion of Major AI Platform
key_claims: Autonomous AI agent executed 17,000+ actions over approximately 11 days before detection
Datasets and API credentials exfiltrated from private repositories
No public model weights were modified or injected with malicious code
First publicly confirmed autonomous AI agent sustained attack on a major AI infrastructure platform
caveats: Investigation ongoing at disclosure — full scope and attacker attribution unconfirmed at publication time

items.title: EU Issues Binding DMA Orders Requiring Google to Open Android AI and Share Search Data
key_claims: 11 Android AI features must be opened to third-party interoperability
Google must share search index data with competing search engines
August 2026 deadline for Android AI interoperability; January 2027 for search data sharing
Non-compliance fines can reach 10% of global annual turnover under DMA
Google is appealing and issued warning about privacy and security risks
caveats: Google is appealing — implementation deadlines may slip depending on court proceedings

items.title: Claude Code v2.1.216 Patches PowerShell Security Bypass and Long-Session Slowdown
key_claims: PowerShell security bypass allowed crafted commands to circumvent operator trust-level checks from v2.1.212 — severity rated high
Quadratic token-cost regression in long sessions resolved — sessions over ~2 hours most affected
Immediate upgrade recommended for Windows PowerShell environments

items.title: Claude Fable 5 Permanently Included in Max and Team Premium from July 20
key_claims: Fable 5 permanently included in Claude Max and Team Premium plans
50% usage limits apply relative to full Fable 5 API allocation
$100 platform credit issued to existing Pro and Team Standard subscribers
caveats: No sunset date announced for lower-tier Fable 5 access or change to Sonnet 5 availability

items.title: Alibaba Previews Qwen3.8-Max at WAIC — 2.4T Model, No Benchmark Data Published
key_claims: Sparse MoE architecture with 2.4T total parameters
Claimed 1M-token context window
Preview API with unspecified pricing
No model card, active expert count, or independent benchmark published
caveats: All performance claims are from Alibaba WAIC keynote — no independent evaluation exists
Alibaba primary product page returned empty content on fetch — secondary sources only

items.title: Current AI Secures $400M to Build Public AI Infrastructure for Underserved Languages
key_claims: $400M committed funding; $2.5B five-year target
Backers include French government, Ford Foundation, MacArthur Foundation, DeepMind, Salesforce
22 Indian languages in initial scope
Open-weight models and freely licensed datasets planned
Nonprofit governance structure to prevent single-vendor lock-in
caveats: $2.5B is a stated aspiration; only $400M is committed funding
Language coverage claims and timeline are from the organization's own materials
